requirement_topic.en: Nigerian Market Access — SONCAP Certification, Registered In-Country Importer and Form M
requirement_topic.zh: 尼日利亚市场准入——SONCAP认证、注册本地进口商及Form M
requirement_topic.zht: 奈及利亞市場准入——SONCAP認證、登記本地進口商及Form M

summary.en: Non-Nigerian manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Nigerian market must satisfy the following market access obligations: (1) SONCAP certification — a two-step mandatory scheme run by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria: first a Product Certificate (PC) issued to the exporter/product after conformity assessment against the applicable NIS (IEC 62133-2 basis), then a separate SONCAP Certificate (SC) issued for each individual shipment before the goods arrive, without which the consignment cannot clear customs. (2) Registered in-country importer — the goods must be consigned to a Nigerian-registered importer who initiates the import documentation; the exporter cannot self-import. (3) Form M and PAAR — the Nigerian importer must open a Form M (import declaration) through an authorised dealer bank on the Nigeria Single Window/trade portal and obtain a Pre-Arrival Assessment Report (PAAR) from the Nigeria Customs Service; the SONCAP SC is linked to the Form M. (4) NCC Type Approval where the product has wireless functions, in addition to SONCAP. Clearance ports are typically Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne.
summary.zh: 将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放尼日利亚市场的非尼日利亚制造商，须满足以下市场准入义务：（1）SONCAP认证——由尼日利亚标准组织运行的两步强制计划：首先在依据适用NIS（IEC 62133-2基准）完成合格评定后向出口商/产品签发产品证书（PC），随后在货物到达前为每一批货物单独签发SONCAP证书（SC），缺此货物无法清关。（2）注册本地进口商——货物须发运至已在尼日利亚注册的进口商，由其发起进口文件；出口商不能自行进口。（3）Form M及PAAR——尼日利亚进口商须经授权交易银行在尼日利亚单一窗口/贸易门户开立Form M（进口申报），并向尼日利亚海关取得到货前评估报告（PAAR）；SONCAP的SC与Form M关联。（4）含无线功能时，除SONCAP外还须NCC型号核准。清关港口通常为拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne。
summary.zht: 將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放奈及利亞市場的非奈及利亞製造商，須滿足以下市場准入義務：（1）SONCAP認證——由奈及利亞標準組織運行的兩步強制計劃：首先在依據適用NIS（IEC 62133-2基準）完成合格評定後向出口商/產品簽發產品證書（PC），隨後在貨物到達前為每一批貨物單獨簽發SONCAP證書（SC），缺此貨物無法清關。（2）登記本地進口商——貨物須發運至已在奈及利亞登記的進口商，由其發起進口文件；出口商不能自行進口。（3）Form M及PAAR——奈及利亞進口商須經授權交易銀行在奈及利亞單一窗口/貿易門戶開立Form M（進口申報），並向奈及利亞海關取得到貨前評估報告（PAAR）；SONCAP的SC與Form M關聯。（4）含無線功能時，除SONCAP外還須NCC型號核准。清關港口通常為拉各斯（Apapa/Tin Can）或Onne。

standards_or_laws: SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) — Product Certificate (PC) plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (SC); Standards Organisation of Nigeria Act, 2015
Central Bank of Nigeria Form M regime and Nigeria Single Window — import declaration for the registered importer
Nigeria Customs Service — Pre-Arrival Assessment Report (PAAR) linked to Form M
Nigerian Communications Act, 2003 — NCC Type Approval where wireless functions are present

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). CCC is a Chinese domestic requirement and is not recognised by SON or Nigerian customs; it does not substitute for SONCAP. There is no Chinese equivalent of the Nigerian per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, the registered-importer/Form M structure, or the PAAR pre-arrival assessment as conditions imposed on the exporter. Chinese manufacturers selling domestically do not appoint a foreign in-country importer.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。CCC属中国国内要求，不被SON或尼日利亚海关认可，不可替代SONCAP。对于出口商，中国没有等同于尼日利亚每批次SONCAP证书、注册进口商/Form M结构或PAAR到货前评估的对应要求。国内销售的中国制造商无需任命外国本地进口商。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。CCC屬中國國內要求，不被SON或奈及利亞海關認可，不可替代SONCAP。對於出口商，中國沒有等同於奈及利亞每批次SONCAP證書、登記進口商/Form M結構或PAAR到貨前評估的對應要求。國內銷售的中國製造商無需任命外國本地進口商。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Nigeria
China customs export declaration framework (GACC) — domestic export documentation

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable batteries to Nigeria face structural market access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) two-step SONCAP — a Product Certificate plus a fresh per-shipment SONCAP Certificate for every consignment, both mandatory before customs clearance; (2) a Nigerian-registered in-country importer is required as consignee — the exporter cannot import directly, and the importer drives the Form M and PAAR steps; (3) Form M must be opened through an authorised dealer bank and a PAAR obtained from Nigeria Customs, with the SONCAP SC tied to the Form M number; (4) where wireless, separate NCC Type Approval. CCC certification (Chinese domestic) does not transfer to any of these. Compliance cost typically includes conformity-assessment/PC fees, a per-shipment SC fee, importer/agent fees, and (where wireless) NCC Type Approval fees.
gap.zh: 向尼日利亚出口便携式电池的中国制造商面临在中国国内无对应制度的结构性市场准入差距：（1）两步SONCAP——产品证书加每一批货物新的每批次SONCAP证书，二者均为清关前强制；（2）须有已在尼日利亚注册的本地进口商作为收货人——出口商不能直接进口，由进口商推动Form M及PAAR步骤；（3）Form M须经授权交易银行开立，并向尼日利亚海关取得PAAR，SONCAP的SC与Form M编号绑定；（4）含无线时另须NCC型号核准。CCC认证（中国国内）无法转移至上述任何一项。合规成本通常包括合格评定/PC费用、每批次SC费用、进口商/代理费用，以及（含无线时）NCC型号核准费用。
gap.zht: 向奈及利亞出口便攜式電池的中國製造商面臨在中國國內無對應制度的結構性市場准入差距：（1）兩步SONCAP——產品證書加每一批貨物新的每批次SONCAP證書，二者均為清關前強制；（2）須有已在奈及利亞登記的本地進口商作為收貨人——出口商不能直接進口，由進口商推動Form M及PAAR步驟；（3）Form M須經授權交易銀行開立，並向奈及利亞海關取得PAAR，SONCAP的SC與Form M編號綁定；（4）含無線時另須NCC型號核准。CCC認證（中國國內）無法轉移至上述任何一項。合規成本通常包括合格評定/PC費用、每批次SC費用、進口商/代理費用，以及（含無線時）NCC型號核准費用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SONCAP Product Certificate plus per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, a Nigerian-registered in-country importer, and Form M/PAAR are required before customs clearance; NCC Type Approval is additionally mandatory for wireless products
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of SONCAP per-shipment certification, registered-importer/Form M, or PAAR required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address several Nigerian market access obligations before entry: a SONCAP Product Certificate and a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate, a Nigerian-registered in-country importer as consignee, a Form M opened through an authorised dealer bank with a Customs PAAR, and (for wireless variants) NCC Type Approval. The per-shipment SONCAP Certificate must be obtained before each consignment arrives. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Nigerian requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商在进入尼日利亚市场前，须应对多项市场准入义务：SONCAP产品证书及每批次SONCAP证书、作为收货人的尼日利亚注册本地进口商、经授权交易银行开立的Form M及海关PAAR，以及（无线型号）NCC型号核准。每批次SONCAP证书须在每一批货物到达前取得。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何尼日利亚要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商在進入奈及利亞市場前，須應對多項市場准入義務：SONCAP產品證書及每批次SONCAP證書、作為收貨人的奈及利亞登記本地進口商、經授權交易銀行開立的Form M及海關PAAR，以及（無線型號）NCC型號核准。每批次SONCAP證書須在每一批貨物到達前取得。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何奈及利亞要求。

source.publisher: Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) — SONCAP programme
